channel.title: NDTV News Search Records Found 1000
channel.description: NDTV.com provides the latest information from and in-depth coverage of India and the world. Find breaking news, India news, top stories, elections, politics, business, cricket, movies, lifestyle, health, live TV, videos, photos and more.

item.title: AI Surpassing Humans Debate Heats Up As Google AI Boss Tightens Timeline

media:content.media:description: AI will eventually be better than all humans at everything, says OpenAI's Sam Altman

item.description: Google DeepMind CEO Demis Hassabis has again stirred up the AGI or Superhuman AI debate, Google CEO Sundar Pichai has also chimed in.
item.content:encoded: Google DeepMind CEO Demis Hassabis has again stirred up the AGI or Superhuman AI debate, Google CEO Sundar Pichai has also chimed in.

item.title: "Never Ever": North Korea Rejects Denuclearisation Push By Quad Nations

media:content.media:description: North Korea's foreign ministry also accused the Quad of interfering in Pyongyang's sovereign affairs

item.description: North Korea on Thursday condemned the joint statement issued by the Quad nations calling for Pyongyang's complete denuclearisation, reiterating that it will never abandon its nuclear weapons program, according to South Korean news agency Yonhap.
item.content:encoded: North Korea on Thursday condemned the joint statement issued by the Quad nations calling for Pyongyang's complete denuclearisation, reiterating that it will never abandon its nuclear weapons program, according to South Korean news agency Yonhap.

item.title: NDTV Ground Report From Israel's Most Active Conflict Zone Near Lebanon Border

media:content.media:description: In Northern Israel, Hezbollah threat still looms large. Ground report from Tefen.

item.description: NDTV reports from Tefen, one of the most sensitive conflict zones along Israel's northern front, where Hezbollah attacks continue to keep both civilians and security forces under pressure.
item.content:encoded: NDTV reports from Tefen, one of the most sensitive conflict zones along Israel's northern front, where Hezbollah attacks continue to keep both civilians and security forces under pressure.

item.title: US Hunger Crisis Worsens Beyond Covid Years: New York Fed

media:content.media:description: The survey was conducted before the Iran war, which has hiked the price of groceries in US (File)

item.description: More Americans are suffering from hunger this year than during the height of the Covid-19 pandemic, the Federal Reserve Bank of New York said Wednesday.
item.content:encoded: More Americans are suffering from hunger this year than during the height of the Covid-19 pandemic, the Federal Reserve Bank of New York said Wednesday.

item.title: Iran War LIVE Updates: US, Iran Trade Strikes After Trump's 'Negotiating On Fumes' Warning

media:content.media:description: US Iran War LIVE Updates

item.description: US Iran War LIVE Updates: US President Donald Trump had on Wednesday dismissed an Iranian state media report that Iran and Oman would jointly manage shipping through the Strait of Hormuz
item.content:encoded: US Iran War LIVE Updates: US President Donald Trump had on Wednesday dismissed an Iranian state media report that Iran and Oman would jointly manage shipping through the Strait of Hormuz

item.title: Parking Zone To Hospital In 7 Hours: Inside Underground Health Camp In Israel

media:content.media:description: The atmosphere resembles a military bunker merged with a modern hospital.

item.description: The hospital was designed after the 2006 Lebanon war exposed the vulnerability of northern Israel's medical infrastructure.
item.content:encoded: The hospital was designed after the 2006 Lebanon war exposed the vulnerability of northern Israel's medical infrastructure.

item.title: 'You Had A Hand Up': US Cop To Disabled Woman Without Right Hand, Video Viral

media:content.media:description: Charges dropped against disabled woman after police error in wireless device violation case.

item.description: A disabled woman had charges dropped against her after a police officer wrongly cited her for distracted driving.
item.content:encoded: A disabled woman had charges dropped against her after a police officer wrongly cited her for distracted driving.

item.title: Russia Claims Discovery Of US-Linked Bioweapons Programme In Ukraine

media:content.media:description: Russia has long accused the US of funding biological research programmes in Ukraine.

item.description: Russia's Investigative Committee said its findings were based on documents and materials allegedly recovered during military operations
item.content:encoded: Russia's Investigative Committee said its findings were based on documents and materials allegedly recovered during military operations

item.title: Ex-CIA Official Accused Of Stealing $40 Million In Gold Bars, Cash

media:content.media:description: The FBI said it was working with the CIA and Department of Justice in its investigation

item.description: David Rush was arrested and charged with criminal theft of public money last week, according to federal court filings in Virginia, where he lives.
item.content:encoded: David Rush was arrested and charged with criminal theft of public money last week, according to federal court filings in Virginia, where he lives.

item.title: Saudi Arabia, US To Manufacture Drones Inspired By Iran's Shahed: Report

media:content.media:description: SKYWASP has a strike range of nearly 1,500 kilometres.

item.description: A new facility planned near Riyadh will manufacture long-range attack drones through a partnership between American firm Vector Defense and Saudi startup SR2 Defense Systems.
item.content:encoded: A new facility planned near Riyadh will manufacture long-range attack drones through a partnership between American firm Vector Defense and Saudi startup SR2 Defense Systems.

item.title: Trump's 'Legal Shield' Could Face Reversal After White House Exit

media:content.media:description: Todd Blanche recently approved two major documents that have created controversy.

item.description: Reports state that Trump has become more powerful as president because recent Supreme Court rulings have given the White House more authority.
item.content:encoded: Reports state that Trump has become more powerful as president because recent Supreme Court rulings have given the White House more authority.

item.title: Woman In China Vanishes Without Paying Rent, Leaves Dog Trapped In Filthy Apartment

media:content.media:description: Representative image.

item.description: The dog was taken into care by local animal welfare volunteers. It appeared malnourished.
item.content:encoded: The dog was taken into care by local animal welfare volunteers. It appeared malnourished.

item.title: Your Next Job Interview Could Be With AI: Here's How To Prepare

media:content.media:description: Recruiters have been using AI-powered hiring tools for years to assess job applicants (Representational)

item.description: Deluged by a flood of AI-generated job applications from easy-apply job boards, recruiters are turning to AI to cope. Companies are using chatbots to interview candidates, typically at the screening stage
item.content:encoded: Deluged by a flood of AI-generated job applications from easy-apply job boards, recruiters are turning to AI to cope. Companies are using chatbots to interview candidates, typically at the screening stage

item.title: US-China Conflict Over Taiwan Risks Nuclear Escalation: Study

media:content.media:description: China has ramped up pressure on Taiwan by increasing its military presence

item.description: Beijing has never ruled out the use of force to take control of Taiwan, but has also said it would prefer "peaceful reunification." Taiwan's government rejects Beijing's sovereignty claims.
item.content:encoded: Beijing has never ruled out the use of force to take control of Taiwan, but has also said it would prefer "peaceful reunification." Taiwan's government rejects Beijing's sovereignty claims.

item.title: 22-Year-Old Student From Gujarat Stabbed To Death In Canada

media:content.media:description: Vidhi Kalpeshbhai Meghani was stabbed earlier this month

item.description: The victim has been identified as Vidhi Kalpeshbhai Meghani, a resident of Borsad in the Anand district of Gujarat.
item.content:encoded: The victim has been identified as Vidhi Kalpeshbhai Meghani, a resident of Borsad in the Anand district of Gujarat.

item.title: Why Israel's Haifa Port Matters To India As Iran War Impacts Trade Routes

media:content.media:description: Officials and analysts believe Haifa could become one of the most important transit points.

item.description: Despite the volatile security environment, operations continue at the port that has emerged as a key node in India's larger geopolitical vision.
item.content:encoded: Despite the volatile security environment, operations continue at the port that has emerged as a key node in India's larger geopolitical vision.

item.title: Passengers Panic As Plane Aborts Two Landings At Mountain Airport In Remote Colombian City

media:content.media:description: Representative image.

item.description: The repeated attempts triggered distress in the cabin, with several passengers reportedly crying and others becoming physically ill.
item.content:encoded: The repeated attempts triggered distress in the cabin, with several passengers reportedly crying and others becoming physically ill.

item.title: US To Probe E Jean Carroll, Ex-Columnist Who Accused Trump Of Sexual Assault

media:content.media:description: Trump has repeatedly urged his Justice Department to take action against his enemies

item.description: In one of the lawsuits, E Jean Carroll alleged that Donald Trump sexually assaulted her in a New York department store in 1996.
item.content:encoded: In one of the lawsuits, E Jean Carroll alleged that Donald Trump sexually assaulted her in a New York department store in 1996.

item.title: US Sanctions Iran's Persian Gulf Strait Authority Set To Manage Hormuz

media:content.media:description: Iran's chokehold on the strait has caused worldwide energy shocks

item.description: The sanctions target Iran's Persian Gulf Strait Authority and any person or entity cooperating with the agency, announced earlier this month
item.content:encoded: The sanctions target Iran's Persian Gulf Strait Authority and any person or entity cooperating with the agency, announced earlier this month

item.title: Uganda Closes Border With Congo Amid Rising Ebola Cases

media:content.media:description: Congolese health authorities are struggling to contain the outbreak, which WHO says is outpacing them

item.description: The measure, which goes against the guidance by the World Health Organization, underscores growing fears of contagion in East Africa from Bundibugyo, a rare type of the Ebola virus that is behind this outbreak
item.content:encoded: The measure, which goes against the guidance by the World Health Organization, underscores growing fears of contagion in East Africa from Bundibugyo, a rare type of the Ebola virus that is behind this outbreak
